summary: Phase D: Self-hosted deploy surface — systemd, Caddy, deploy.sh, vps-bootstrap, backup, runbook (§7.4–7.8)

resolution.note: All 7 children closed — D11 (systemd unit), D12 (Caddyfile), D13 (deploy.sh + auto-migrate via 866db541), D14 (vps-bootstrap.sh), D15 (backup.sh), D16 (incident runbook). Phase D operational surface complete and verified end-to-end: VPS hardened, TLS terminating with AOP, app deployed via push-to-main + Tailscale + SSH, backups uploaded to B2 nightly, app boot does fail-fast assertions (via Phase C C10).
